This was actually a pretty clean explanation of the first candle idea. Waiting for the 9:30 range and then the break + retest makes a lot more sense than just jumping into moves right away. I’ve been trying to line stuff like this up with how I map structure, and using the first light beacon while watching those levels has helped me see when the move actually has real order flow behind it. Definitely made the strategy easier to understand.

Just 10 minutes of backtesting and 6 failures out of 8 trades were enough to realize it doesn't work. Don't be naive; if it were that easy, we'd all be millionaires.

We mark the 30-minute candle that closes at 9:30.
After that, we observe the first 5-minute candle (the 9:35 candle).
If the 5-minute candle breaks the 30-minute candle from above, we take a SELL trade.
If the 5-minute candle breaks the 30-minute candle from below, we take a BUY trade.
